hero.title: Welcome to
hero.subtitle: Find out who doesn't follow you back. Upload your Instagram export, get the answer in seconds. Free, private, no account needed.

one.title: Get your data
one.description: Instagram → Account Center → Your information and permissions → Export your information. Choose JSON. It's a few clicks more than it should be — that part's on them.

two.title: Upload the files
two.description: Drop your followers and following files below. Everything runs in your browser. Nothing is uploaded, stored, or sent anywhere.

three.title: Get the results
three.description: See who doesn't follow back, who you don't follow back, and your mutuals. That's it.

footer.support: Folo is free and open source. No ads, no tracking, no catch. If it was useful, maybe consider buying me a coffee ☕
footer.privacy: 100% private — your data never leaves your browser
footer.legal: Not affiliated with Instagram or Meta Platforms, Inc. · Use only your own exported data. Instagram is a trademark of Meta Platforms, Inc.

privacy.badge: Runs entirely in your browser — no data collected

one.q: Do I need to log in or create an account?
one.a: No. Folo works entirely with your Instagram data export. No login required — just upload your followers.json and following.json files and get instant results.

two.a: Yes, completely. Folo runs 100% in your browser. Your data is never sent to any server, stored, or shared with anyone.

three.q: How do I export my Instagram data?
three.a: Open Instagram → Settings → Account Centre → Your information and permissions → Export your information → Create export. Select your account, then choose Export to device. Set date range to All time, format to JSON. Tap Customise information and select only Followers and following. You'll receive a download link by email within a few minutes.

four.a: Yes, completely free. No ads, no premium plan, no hidden fees — and it will stay that way.
